issues.description: TrashFromHand should be optional (You may trash). Current DSL makes it mandatory.
Filter is overly restrictive. Text says 'trash 1 card from your hand' with no type restriction, but DSL limits to Character type only.

SearchDeck implementation is incomplete. Must: (1) look at top 5 cards, (2) reveal up to 2 Navy cards excluding [Sengoku], (3) add to hand, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only searches deck without the 'look at 5' constraint or exclusion logic.
Filter uses kind:'ByName' which is incorrect for type-based filtering. Should use kind:'ByType' with type:'Navy', plus additional constraint to exclude [Sengoku] by name.
